com.example.getoutthere.entrant
 
  • Classes in com.example.getoutthere.entrant used by com.example.getoutthere.entrant
    Class
    Description
    EntrantDashboardActivity
    Acts as the primary navigation dashboard for Entrant users.
    EntrantNotificationActivity
    Represents the screen where entrants can view and interact with their notifications.
    EntrantNotificationActivity.NotificationAdapter
    Inner class adapter responsible for binding notification data to the RecyclerView.
    EntrantNotificationActivity.NotificationAdapter.ViewHolder
    ViewHolder for notification items.

    HistoryEventAdapter
     
    ProfileActivity
    Allows the user to manage their personal Entrant Profile.
    SignUpActivity
    Handles the registration process for new users (Entrants).
